prompt: A luxurious vintage-style travel poster for Austria, designed like a premium tourism advertisement. Use an elegant, symmetrical poster layout with thin gold decorative border lines and small ornamental corner details. At the top center, place a minimalist gold mountain emblem above the word “DISCOVER”, then a very large refined serif title reading AUSTRIA in deep burgundy red. Beneath it, add a small uppercase tagline in gold: “TIMELESS BEAUTY. RICH HERITAGE. UNFORGETTABLE EXPERIENCES.” and below that an italic script line: “Where Tradition Meets Breathtaking Nature.” Place a small horizontal Austrian flag motif between the lines. The main image should be a breathtaking composite alpine lake scene at golden hour: on the left, a dramatic hilltop fortress resembling Salzburg Castle perched on a rocky cliff above the water; in the center distance, a calm reflective lake leading into a valley of towering snow-capped Alps; on the right, a picturesque Austrian lakeside village resembling Hallstatt with steep-roofed houses, a tall church spire, a hillside church, and clustered wooden buildings descending to the water. Warm sunlight from the left, crisp blue sky, glowing highlights on the mountains, rich reflections in the lake, romantic cinematic atmosphere, ultra-detailed, majestic and inviting. Along the lower middle, show exactly 5 gold icon-and-label tourism highlights spaced evenly: 1 castle icon with “ICONIC LANDMARKS”, 1 classical column icon with “RICH HERITAGE”, 1 music note icon with “VIBRANT CULTURE”, 1 heart icon with “WARM HOSPITALITY”, and 1 mountain icon with “BREATHTAKING LANDSCAPES”. At the bottom, create a horizontal food strip with exactly 5 framed culinary photos separated by thin dividers under the centered heading “SAVOR THE TASTE OF AUSTRIA”. The 5 dishes are: Wiener Schnitzel, Appelstrudel, Kaiserschmarrn, Sachertorte, and Melange. Each food image should be realistic, warmly lit, plated attractively, and labeled in uppercase serif text beneath the image. Overall style: high-end European travel campaign poster, polished editorial design, romantic nostalgia, refined typography, harmonious gold and burgundy accents, photorealistic scenery blended with luxury brochure aesthetics.
